limitations: The exact run-bottles child return code was not captured for the clean-restoration session.
Independent external-network denial from inside the sandbox remains unverified.
Direct Wine and native Windows recovery have not been validated.
The public fixture excludes private save paths, private identity values, proprietary payload, and the artbook.

tests.evidence: Application version 1.06 was observed during functional acceptance.
The accepted persistent state was restored and the existing save loaded.
Gameplay was functional after clean materialization, deployment, and state restoration.
The game was closed normally through its own flow.
Bottles exited without manual termination after the clean-restoration session.
Two persistent-state items were present and the accepted backup verified.
Six artbook files were inventoried by size and SHA-256 in the canonical collection.

tests.notes: The exact child return code was not persisted in the clean-restoration recovery record.
Offline gbe configuration is preserved, but an independent in-sandbox denial proof is not closed.
